rationale: Adds a single new file `.copilot-review/result.md` containing an Envoy Gateway v1.7.0 to v1.8.0 risk-assessment report for the companion Renovate PR #211. The report enumerates upstream changes (Go CVE bumps in #8709/#8669, client-cert delivery fix for SecurityPolicy in #8654/#8711, RBAC fix for `GatewayNamespace` deploy mode in #8706, HTTP/3+client-TLS interaction fix in #8583, JSON log-key abbreviation in #8555), maps each to specific repo files (`bootstrap/helmfile.d/00-crds.yaml`, `kubernetes/apps/network/envoy-gateway/app/{ocirepository,helmrelease,envoy}.yaml`, the `prometheusrule-platform-envoy-gateway.yaml` and `dashboards/envoy-gateway-traffic.yaml`), and lists six pre-merge verification checks. No source code, manifests, or workflow files are touched — it is a pure review-comment artifact dropped in a dedicated `.copilot-review/` directory, with nothing to falsify.
